page_metadata.biotools__summary: X-CAP is a GBT model that predicts the pathogenicity of single-nucleotide stopgain variants. This repository contains the trained model as well as code to run X-CAP on a VCF file of variants.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: X-CAP is a GBT model that predicts the pathogenicity of single-nucleotide stopgain variants. This repository contains the trained model as well as code to run X-CAP on a VCF file of variants.
